chunks.title: The Last Kings of Judah
chunks.reason: Chronicles the reigns and downfalls of Joahaz, Jehoiakim, and Jehoiachin.

chunks.title: Zedekiah's Rebellion and Prophetic Warning
chunks.reason: Details Zedekiah's reign, his rebellion against Babylon, and the people's rejection of God's messengers.

chunks.title: The Fall of Jerusalem and Exile
chunks.reason: Describes the Babylonian conquest, destruction of the temple, and the seventy-year exile.

chunks.title: Cyrus's Decree
chunks.reason: Contains Cyrus's proclamation allowing the Jews to return and rebuild the temple.
